reviews.review_description:
Great game!! Love the idea of riding in a shopping cart, never seen something like that.
The guy who thought of it is a genius!

Best VR game i have downloaded so far. So realistic and makes you dizzy from all the speed and special effects. Really well made, the feeling is better than jumping in a real roller coaster, is great too for friends and a whole family. Immersion and adrenaline that completely worth the money, beyond the alternative paths that gets you some replay!

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for taking your time to rate our app!! We are so happy that you had a great experience with Zombie Rush!

reviews.review_description: Great fun and graphics!  Hope to see more by dev!  Would pay for again

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking your time to rate our app. Subscribe on our website to receive the updates.

reviews.review_description: This was an awsome experience, wisht there were more!
Riding in a trolley! This is a fun and unique VR experience. Good job.

tryd it again and again no luck still want instal..tryd geting on to site u said 4 help not shore how to get on it..is ther anyway i can delite it and get it bk on.but not think i can delite it as its not instal thanks

developer_response.body: I'm sorry this happened! This is probably an Oculus Store temporary problem. Try again later or enter in contact with us by: contact@b4t.games and we will try to help you! Thank you very much!

reviews.review_description: Love it, just wish it was longer. Great graphics.

This ride is amazing. Even if your not into the whole zombie theme, it still one of the coolest rides on Gear VR. I would love to plow through more zombies and be in a cart with blades or chain saws in front so when u plow into them they explode but  still, this is a great ride! even more, it's EPIC!!! 

WARNING: This app is INTENSE comfort which means getting motion sickness is a real possibility. 

However, with that in mind, if you seek Intense comfort apps for the thrill then this is a MUST have!! 
B4T makes great rides for VR .I used to think Rilix Coaster  was the best ride for Gear VR but B4T will beat them out once EPIC COASTERS (B4T's other Ride) is perfected. 5 stars is much deserved for This app. Keep up the GREAT WORK B4T developers. I am looking forward to buying  more or new content.

developer_response.body: Wow! It is so good to hear it! We are now working especially in Epic Roller Coaster to deliver you guys more rides and emotion. We have the Sanatorium experience too (it is a short real time movie). This kind of feedback is what makes us wake up everyday with the goal of making the best experience for you! Thank you very much! And if you want to get in touch with us, contact by our facebook page https://www.facebook.com/b4t.games!

reviews.review_description: Cool experience! And have Brazilian Portuguese subtitles

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! Yes, we are a brazilian company. So we try to make everything in portuguese and english.

reviews.review_description: Awesome game and roller coaster just hope wish it had some interactions and/ or be bit longer.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much! We are glad that you liked it. Yes, we are working on some interactions. Subscribe on our website to get some news.

reviews.review_description:
I bought this cause the idea seemed original and reviews were positive, but the ride itself is just...bland,  and even the sparse zombie sections aren't scary at all. The other reviews talked about how nice the graphics and physics are, but physics makes no sense most of the time, and textures are poor quality even for a vr title
I can't recommend this to anyone now, but if future updates significantly improve graphics, physics, or at least scariness then I might reconsider my rating

developer_response.body: Hi, thank you for taking your time to get us this great review. It's very hard to please everyone, but we will get your opinion and keep move on to reach the best  possible!

reviews.review_description:
FINALLY another app that flips my tummy and messes with my head like Rilix! This is the kind of app you put on to show someone how fun VR can be. 

I would gladly pay for apps like this but with more options and graphics. This is awesome so far! I will play this over and over. Can't wait for more.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking your time to get us some review! We're so glad that you liked it! Subscribe on our website to receive some news about more! Thank you very much.
